appName.message: Hello Copilot: #1 Browser Layer & AI Workflow Engine

appDesc.message: Your invisible AI layer for the entire web. Summarize YouTube, PDFs, books, Wikipedia, emails, news. Write on Gmail, X, WhatsApp, Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook & Reddit. Search, translate & code. Not a sidebar. A browser-native intelligence layer.

tipBrief.message: Your prompt is brief. Add more detail about what specifically you need.

tipFormat.message: Specify your desired output format (list, table, step-by-step, etc.).

tipAudience.message: Define your target audience or expertise level for a tailored response.

tipConstraints.message: Add constraints (e.g., word count, budget, timeframe) to focus the response.

tipContext.message: Add context about your situation for more relevant suggestions.

tipExamples.message: Include examples of what you're looking for to guide the AI response.

tipRole.message: Assign an expert role (e.g., 'Act as a nutritionist...') for deeper answers.

tipDefault.message: Be specific about what you need — vague prompts get vague answers.

toastRate.message: Love the Browser Layer? Rate us 5-stars!

rateSuccess.message: Thank you for powering the Browser Layer!

browserLayerActive.description: Status badge text in sidebar header

browserLayerTagline.message: Not a wrapper. A browser-native intelligence layer.
